NN_SPLMTL_MH_RSLVD_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Supplemental HRSN Mental Health Resolved 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated supplemental health related social need (HRSN) mental health 
resolved. 

LONG NAME: NN_SPLMTL_MH_RSLVD_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN”
